title: Auto Fast XP
description: Automatically throws XP bottles rapidly when you hold right-click. Perfect for quickly gaining XP!
body:
# Auto Fast XP

Gain XP levels lightning fast! This mod automatically throws XP bottles rapidly when you hold right-click, making leveling up quick and effortless.

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7017f55f603461ba9f235992559134654c3e1a15.png)

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7956d42223dc4e7f0f0ac5ac19089beb871178.png)

## Features

- ✅ **Rapid Throwing** - Throws up to 20 XP bottles per second (default)
- ✅ **Hold to Throw** - Just hold right-click, no need to spam click
- ✅ **Both Hands** - Works with main hand and offhand
- ✅ **Creative Mode** - Doesn't consume bottles in creative
- ✅ **Lightweight** - Minimal performance impact

## How It Works

Hold XP bottles in your hand (main or offhand).
Hold down right-click.
Watch as bottles are thrown rapidly!
Release right-click to stop.

## Use Cases

- **Quick Leveling** - Gain levels fast for enchanting
- **XP Storage** - Quickly convert bottled XP back to levels
- **Enchanting Prep** - Get to level 30 in seconds
- **PVP** - Save time when using XP bottles
